# Tony Vazz

> Marketing leader, AI consultant, and historical fiction author.

Tony Vazz is a marketing professional with over 10 years of experience in technology startups, including two acquisitions totaling over $250 million. He is the founder of Tecnato, an AI consultancy helping Spanish-speaking solopreneurs and small businesses integrate artificial intelligence into their workflows.

He is also the author of "Dados Sangrientos," a historical fiction novel set in post-war Spain, published in 2024.

## Professional Focus

- AI consulting for solopreneurs and small businesses (Spanish-speaking market)
- Marketing leadership and go-to-market strategy
- Content creation and audience building
- Historical fiction writing

## Properties

- Personal website: https://tonyvazz.com
- AI Consultancy: https://tecnato.ai
- AI Newsletter (Tecnato): https://substack.com/@tonyvazz
- Literary Newsletter (Mano Dura): https://manodura.substack.com
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@tonyvazz
- X: https://x.com/vazzdice
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/tonyvazz
- GitHub: https://github.com/vazzdice
- Book (Amazon): https://www.amazon.es/dp/8409615800

## Services

Tony offers AI workflow consulting through Tecnato:
- Free 20-minute introductory calls
- 90-minute AI Workflow Sessions (€150) with live implementation
- Contact: tony@tecnato.ai

## Content

Tony publishes weekly on Substack covering practical AI tools, workflows, and strategies for entrepreneurs. Content is in Spanish (neutral/international).
